mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reader WHERE reader_no = #{readerNo} AND status = 1

SELECT * FROM reader WHERE status = 1
AND (reader_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reader(reader_no, username, password, name, gender, phone, email, department, status, create_time) VALUES(#{readerNo}, #{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{department}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reader SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reader WHERE status = 1
